ModMetaData.name: HSK RN Weapon Router
ModMetaData.author: CarbineAction
ModMetaData.description:
Reroutes all craftable weapons to the three Rimmu-Nation² workbenches (RNBench_CQB, RNBench_LBW, RNBench_HeavyWeapons) based on weapon category.
- Pistols / Revolvers / SMGs / PDWs / Shotguns → RNBench_CQB - Assault rifles / Bolt actions / DMRs / AMRs / Sniper rifles → RNBench_LBW - LMGs / HMGs / Launchers / Spacer weapons / Grenades → RNBench_HeavyWeapons - Anything else with a recipeMaker that doesn't match a category → RNBench_LBW (fallback)
Replace mode: the original recipeUsers list is removed and replaced with the matching RN bench. Load AFTER all weapon mods.
